## What and why
<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type
- [ ] New or improved template (`templates/`)
- [ ] Script fix or improvement (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Reference / docs (`references/`, `SKILL.md`)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] `shellcheck scripts/*.sh` passes (if scripts changed)
- [ ] Templates still use generic `{{PLACEHOLDERS}}`, no hardcoded names or paths
- [ ] No secrets or personal paths committed
- [ ] SKILL.md / references updated if behaviour changed
